Help Center

Frequently Asked Questions

Find answers to common questions about booking tours, using the app, and becoming a provider.

Booking

Booking is easy! Browse our tours, select your preferred date and trip type, choose a pickup point, and complete payment. You'll receive a QR code ticket instantly.
